name: DP Synthesis — Patterns, Optimization, Interview Strategy

metadata.career_relevance: Core DP patterns — highest-value DSA topic in senior interviews.

hook.what_you_will_build: DP Synthesis — Patterns, Optimization, Interview Strategy

key_takeaways: 1D sequences: House Robber, LIS, Coin Change, Jump Game
2D grids: Unique Paths, Minimum Path Sum
2 strings: Edit Distance, LCS, Wildcard Match
Space opt: rolling array reduces O(mn) to O(n)
Interview tip: state DP[i] meaning first, then recurrence, then base case
Hard DPs: Burst Balloons (reversed thinking), Strange Printer, Strange Coin
reflection.next_topic_preview: Module 41 complete! Track 3 DSA DONE. Next: M42-M46 Interview Prep.
